name: Pizzaboy
description:
A Fan-Take on Pizzaboy from Pizza Tower!

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take.

Feel free to tell me what you think about my bots, and publish public chats, I think It'd be neat to know how people are interacting with them.

Still a port of my CharacterAI stuff.

You can find my CharacterAI Account here Although the AI's here are more up to date so I recommend staying here.

[Couldn't think of a quote to put in the bio this time]
